- reel 3: 12.5s, 8 shots, cuts/sec=0.56, shot types: broll_talking_head 30%, broll_visual 26%, talking_head_unknown 24%, talking_head 20%; captions: Hormozi; bottom, word_by_word/1 words, uppercase, large, bordered black, pop, Baloo 2, highlight yellow; text overlays 100% at mixed; overlays: none; motion: 38% moving; none 63%, ken_burns 25%, zoom_in 13%; SFX 29/min, 50% cut hits
